description: The Kizuna-kai is a yakuza organization based in Hyogo, Japan, formed on April 30, 2017 by defectors from the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi. It was originally named Ninkyo-dantai-Yamaguchi-gumi, then Ninkyo Yamaguchi-gumi, before adopting its current name in 2020. The group has about 50 members and 70 quasi-members, and is designated as a bōryokudan by the Hyogo Prefecture Public Safety Commission.
